document.description: The Terms of Service document in Base64-encoded format.

id.description: The unique identifier of the legal entity.

language.description: The language used for the Terms of Service document, specified by the two-letter [ISO 639-1](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_ISO_639-1_codes) language code. Possible value: **en** for English.

termsOfServiceDocumentId.description: The unique identifier of the Terms of Service document.

type.description:
The type of Terms of Service.

Possible values:
*  **adyenForPlatformsManage**
*  **adyenIssuing**
*  **adyenForPlatformsAdvanced**
*  **adyenCapital**
*  **adyenAccount**
*  **adyenCard**
*  **adyenFranchisee**
